item.name: Honeycomb Fish
item.description:
It is remarkable how much this fish resembles a bee's nest, given that it has probably never even seen one before.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The pattern on this wavekin's scales creates the illusion of a small rock honeycombed with holes. When tiny fish swim near, seeking refuge in these “hollows,” they instead find themselves trapped inside a toothy cavern. Momentarily, at least.
